name: Pineapple Sorbet
servings: serves 6 1 large ripe pineapple, skinned and cored 60 g caster sugar 100 ml water

ingredients.item: large ripe pineapple, skinned and cored

method: Serves 6 1 large ripe pineapple, skinned and cored 60 g caster sugar 100 ml water
Cut the pineapple into pieces, place it in a food processor and process until smooth.

Make a syrup with the sugar and water and, when cool, add to the pineapple purée. Taste to see if it sweet enough and add more sugar if necessary. Churn the mixture in an ice cream machine until fluffy.
